module.name: mindmap
module.description: A mind map: a central topic with branches fanning out left and right, each branch with sub-items. First section = center, each following section = one branch (first line = title, rest = children).
module.aiSpec:
A MIND MAP — a central topic with colored branches alternating right/left, each with its sub-items. Use this for brainstorming overviews and topic breakdowns; for a strict top-down tree/org chart use @tree, and for process steps use @flow. Block module: split the body with <!-- @ -->: • FIRST section = the central topic (Markdown), • each following section = one branch: its FIRST LINE is the branch title, the remaining lines are that branch's sub-items (one per line, or a "- " list). Keep to ~6 branches. Parameters: • color — override the auto colour used for every branch (default blank = auto palette). • layout — branch placement: alternate (right/left/right…), right (all right), left (all left) (default alternate). • centerColor — accent color of the central node (default blank = var(--accent-color)). • gap — CSS length of the horizontal gap between the sides and the centre (default 28px). • scale — overall size multiplier of the whole map (0.6-2, default 1).
<!-- @mindmap layout: alternate, centerColor: #6d28d9 --> **Product** <!-- @ --> Design UI UX <!-- @ --> Tech API DB <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Override branch color
param.desc: Force one color for all branches; blank uses the automatic palette.

param.name: layout
param.label: Branch layout
param.desc: Where branches are placed relative to the centre.
param.options: alternate:Alternate sides,right:All on right,left:All on left

param.name: centerColor
param.label: Center color
param.desc: Accent color of the central node; blank keeps the theme accent.

param.name: gap
param.label: Side gap
param.desc: CSS length of the gap between each side and the centre (e.g. 28px, 2rem).

param.name: scale
param.label: Scale
param.desc: Overall size multiplier of the whole mind map.

snippet.label: Mind map
snippet.text: <!-- @mindmap --> **Central topic** <!-- @ --> Branch A item 1 item 2 <!-- @ --> Branch B item 3 item 4 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Center + branches (first line = title, rest = sub-items), alternating sides.
